toolbox_name: SparkFun SHTC3 Humidity and Temperature Sensor

shtc3_init.tooltip: Create and initialize SHTC3 humidity and temperature sensor (I2C, default Wire)

shtc3_update.tooltip: Trigger SHTC3 measurement and update temperature/humidity data

shtc3_temp_c.tooltip: Get the last measured Celsius temperature from SHTC3

shtc3_temp_f.tooltip: Get the last measured Fahrenheit temperature from SHTC3

shtc3_humidity.tooltip: Get the last measured relative humidity percentage from SHTC3
